meta._synthetic: Synthea-style synthetic patient cohort. NO real patient data. Generated for ClinicalMem hackathon demo (Apache-2.0). All names, DOBs, addresses, NPIs, and identifiers are entirely fictional. NPIs generated via CMS Luhn algorithm with deterministic seed strings; marked npi_source=DEMO_LUHN_GENERATED.
